notes: Full Ballard brunch menu captured including eggs/benedicts, griddle items, house favorites (lunch), sides, grains, and weekday small plates. No beverage list present in the raw text; beverages section is empty. Some column-bleed ordering in raw text reconstructed by section headers.

dishes.name: Huevos Rancheros
dishes.description: 2 organic corn tortillas, 2 eggs, house-made mole verde sauce, spicy 3 bean mix, queso fresco, pickled onion. Add avocado +2.75, add carnitas or Uli's chorizo +3.50. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic green salad.

dishes.name: Rancher's Breakfast
dishes.description: 3 eggs, choice of Hill's pepper bacon, Uli's maple pork or rosemary chicken sausage, choice of classic pancakes or french toast plus trip to berry bar. Substitute a full classic pancakes or different griddle item +2.00–3.00. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic green salad.

dishes.name: Phil's Breakfast
dishes.description: 3 eggs, choice of Hill's pepper bacon or Uli's maple pork or rosemary chicken sausage, house-made honey wheat toast. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic green salad.

dishes.name: Joe's Scramble
dishes.description: Beecher's Flagship cheddar, organic spinach, sautéed mushrooms, 3 eggs, choice of maple pork or rosemary chicken sausage, house-made honey wheat toast. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic green salad.

dishes.name: Goat Cheese Omelette
dishes.description: 3 eggs, herbed goat cheese, baby spinach, sautéed mushrooms, cherry tomatoes, scallions, house-made honey wheat toast. Add Dungeness crab +12.00. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic green salad.

dishes.name: Carnitas Benedict
dishes.description: Pork carnitas, 2 poached organic eggs, adobo hollandaise, pickled onion garnish, house-made organic Yukon Gold potato English muffin. Add avocado +2.75. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic salad.

dishes.name: Classic Benedict
dishes.description: Thinly sliced ham, fresh hollandaise, paprika garnish, house-made organic Yukon Gold potato English muffin. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic salad.

dishes.name: Seattle Benedict
dishes.description: Dungeness crab (cold), organic arugula, avocado (cold), fresh hollandaise, dill garnish, house-made organic Yukon Gold potato English muffin. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic salad.

dishes.name: Mushroom Benedict
dishes.description: Sautéed wild mushrooms, organic butternut squash, herbed goat cheese, house-made fig jam, fresh hollandaise, microgreen garnish, house-made organic Yukon Gold potato English muffin. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic salad.

dishes.name: Smoked Salmon Benedict
dishes.description: Cold-smoked wild salmon from Oregon, capers, Samish Bay Creamery vache cheese, dill, fresh hollandaise, chive garnish, house-made organic Yukon Gold potato English muffin. Served with herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic salad.

dishes.name: Lemon Ricotta Pancakes
dishes.description: Gluten-free lemon ricotta pancakes, raspberry-lemon curd, organic whipped cream. Includes trip to berry bar.

dishes.name: Vegan Banana Pancakes
dishes.description: Rice flour, rice milk, bananas, powdered sugar garnish. Includes trip to berry bar.

dishes.name: Swedish Pancakes
dishes.description: Rice and tapioca flour pancakes, lingonberry compote, lingonberry compound butter. Includes trip to berry bar.

dishes.name: Pancakes
dishes.description: Heirloom wheat pancakes, yogurt, brown sugar, vanilla. Includes trip to berry bar.

dishes.name: French Toast
dishes.description: House-made challah, vanilla egg batter, powdered sugar garnish. Includes trip to berry bar.

dishes.name: Bananas Foster French Toast
dishes.description: House-made challah, vanilla egg batter, bananas, rum caramel sauce, powdered sugar garnish. Includes trip to berry bar.

dishes.name: Gluten-Free French Toast
dishes.description: House-made gluten-free bread, vanilla egg batter, powdered sugar garnish. Includes trip to berry bar.

dishes.name: Migas
dishes.description: 3 scrambled eggs, cheddar, basil, chipotle, cumin, cilantro-lime crema, house-made salsa, organic flour tortilla, guacamole, choice of herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic salad. Add carnitas or Uli's chorizo +3.50.

dishes.name: Mole Verde Burrito
dishes.description: House-made carnitas, Uli's chorizo, 3 bean mix, organic potatoes, sour cream, organic flour tortilla, molé verde, sunny-side up egg, queso fresco, green onion garnish.

dishes.name: Farmer's Hash Bowl
dishes.description: Seasonal mix of roasted organic vegetables, roasted onion, fingerling potatoes, Tuscan herb blend, 3 over easy eggs, house-made honey wheat toast. Add Hill's pepper bacon, Uli's pork or chicken sausage +3.50. Vegan version available with sautéed mushrooms and tofu substitution for egg +1.00.

dishes.name: Halal Lamb Scramble
dishes.description: Sautéed Uli's halal certified lamb sausage, Schreiber Farms organic asparagus, sautéed mushroom mix, 3 eggs, topped with herbed goat cheese, chives, Aleppo pepper. Choice of herb-roasted potatoes or organic green salad, house-made honey wheat toast. Entire dish can be cooked in a separate clean pan for halal.

dishes.name: Biscuits & Gravy
dishes.description: House-made cheddar biscuit, roasted potatoes, 2 eggs, house-made pork sausage gravy.

dishes.name: Double Smash Burger
dishes.description: Royal Ranch beef patties, Beecher's Flagship cheddar, brioche bun, caramelized onion, organic tomato, arugula, house-made burger sauce. Choice of herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic house salad. Add Hill's pepper bacon +3.00 or fried egg +2.75.

dishes.name: Buddha Bowl
dishes.description: Spiced chickpeas, organic squash, turmeric-roasted cauliflower, mini sweet peppers, pickled red onions, red cabbage, organic salad greens, lemon tahini dressing, choice of fried egg or Island Spring organic tofu, house-made rustic bread. Also available as a wrap.

dishes.name: Breakfast Sandwich
dishes.description: Scrambled eggs, fig jam, Hill's pepper bacon, arugula, aged gouda, house-made potato bread. Choice of herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic green salad.

dishes.name: Grilled Cheese & Tomato Soup
dishes.description: Beecher's Flagship cheddar, aged gouda, house-made potato bread, house-made creamy tomato basil soup.

dishes.name: Halloumi Avocado Toast
dishes.description: Smashed avocado, grilled halloumi cheese, sautéed cherry tomatoes, organic arugula, house-made organic rustic bread, house-made chimichurri. Choice of herb-roasted organic potatoes or green salad. Add a poached egg +2.75.

dishes.name: Chicken Sandwich
dishes.description: Roasted organic chicken, Hill's pepper bacon, organic tomato, iceberg lettuce, garlic aioli, house-made potato bread. Choice of herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic green salad. Add avocado +2.75.

dishes.name: Half Avocado
dishes.description: Half avocado side.

dishes.name: Hill's Pepper Bacon
dishes.description: Side of Hill's pepper bacon.

dishes.name: House-Made Cheddar Biscuit
dishes.description: House-made cheddar biscuit.

dishes.name: Side Organic Eggs
dishes.description: Side of organic eggs.

dishes.name: Side Seasonal Fruit
dishes.description: Side of fresh seasonal fruit.

dishes.name: House-Made Pork Gravy
dishes.description: Side of house-made pork sausage gravy.

dishes.name: House-Made Guacamole
dishes.description: Side of house-made guacamole.

dishes.name: Side Hash Veggies
dishes.description: Side of hash vegetables.

dishes.name: Fresh Hollandaise
dishes.description: Side of fresh hollandaise sauce.

dishes.name: Sautéed Mushrooms
dishes.description: Side of sautéed mushrooms.

dishes.name: Roasted Organic Potatoes
dishes.description: Side of herb-roasted organic potatoes.

dishes.name: Organic House Salad
dishes.description: Side organic house salad.

dishes.name: Fresh Salsa
dishes.description: Side of fresh salsa.

dishes.name: Uli's Sausage
dishes.description: Side of Uli's sausage; choice of rosemary chicken, maple pork, or chorizo.

dishes.name: House-Made Toast
dishes.description: Choice of organic honey wheat, potato, rustic, or English muffin.

dishes.name: House-Made Gluten-Free Toast
dishes.description: House-made gluten-free toast.

dishes.name: Island Springs Organic Tofu
dishes.description: Side of Island Springs organic tofu.

dishes.name: Side Organic Yogurt
dishes.description: Side of organic yogurt.

dishes.name: Trip to the Berry Bar
dishes.description: Access to the berry bar with fresh berries, other fruit, organic whipped cream, and other toppings.

dishes.name: Organic Steel Cut Oats
dishes.description: Slow cooked oats, choice of soy, oat, or 2% milk, house-made granola garnish, fresh fruit.

dishes.name: Granola & Yogurt
dishes.description: Toasted oats, cacao nibs, dried cherries, walnuts, coconut, chia seeds, Greek yogurt, honey garnish, fresh fruit.

dishes.name: Mini Bene
dishes.description: Weekday only. Half order of classic or mushroom benedict. Choice of herb-roasted organic potatoes or organic salad.

dishes.name: Half-Hash Job
dishes.description: Weekday only. Smaller portion of the Farmer's Hash, one egg, house-made honey wheat toast.

dishes.name: The Handheld
dishes.description: Weekday only. Hill's pepper bacon, gouda cheese, 1 over-medium egg, organic arugula, fig jam, house-made Yukon Gold potato English muffin, herb-roasted organic potatoes.

dishes.name: Fun-Sized Phil's
dishes.description: Weekday only. 2 eggs, roasted organic potatoes, slice of house-made honey wheat toast. Add half portion of Hill's pepper bacon, Uli's chicken or pork sausage +3.50.

dishes.name: Small-Sized Buddha
dishes.description: Weekday only. Spiced chickpeas, organic squash, turmeric-roasted cauliflower, mini sweet peppers, pickled red onions, red cabbage, organic salad greens, lemon tahini dressing, house-made rustic bread. Add an egg +2.75 or organic tofu +3.00.
